title: Oscar's Flower Adventure
synopsis: Oscar feels sad when his class flower garden looks bare and empty, but with help from his diverse group of friends and teacher, he discovers the joy of planting seeds and watching them grow into a beautiful rainbow garden.

pages.text: Oscar looked at the school garden with big, sad eyes. The dirt was brown and empty. No pretty flowers anywhere! 'I wish we had colorful flowers,' Oscar said to his teacher, Ms. Chen. His shoulders drooped down low.

illustration.description: Oscar, a young Latino boy with curly dark hair and brown eyes, stands looking sad at an empty rectangular garden plot filled with brown soil. Ms. Chen, an Asian woman with short black hair wearing a bright yellow cardigan, stands beside him with a gentle expression. The school playground is visible in the background with swings and slides.
illustration.alt: Oscar and Ms. Chen looking at an empty garden

pages.text: Ms. Chen smiled warmly. 'We can make this garden beautiful together!' she said. Oscar's friend Zara ran over, her braids bouncing. 'I want to help too!' she said happily. Then Tommy rolled his wheelchair closer. 'Can I plant seeds?' he asked with excited eyes.

illustration.description: Ms. Chen gestures enthusiastically toward the garden with both arms spread wide and a big smile. Zara, a young Black girl with colorful beaded braids, runs toward them with joy. Tommy, a young boy with light skin and freckles in a bright blue wheelchair, approaches with an eager expression. The scene is bright and cheerful with puffy white clouds in the sky.
illustration.alt: Ms. Chen, Zara, and Tommy joining Oscar at the garden

pages.text: Oscar felt a little less sad. Maybe they really could make the garden pretty! Ms. Chen brought out a big box of flower seeds. 'Each of you can choose your favorite colors,' she said. Oscar picked yellow sunflower seeds because they reminded him of sunshine.

illustration.description: Oscar's face shows growing hope and curiosity as he holds small yellow sunflower seeds in his palm. Ms. Chen holds an open wooden box filled with colorful seed packets. Zara examines purple seed packets while Tommy holds red packets. The scene is warm and inviting with golden afternoon light.
illustration.alt: The children choosing their flower seeds

pages.text: The friends worked together in the dirt. Oscar felt brave as he dug little holes for his seeds. 'One, two, three!' he counted as he dropped them in. Zara planted purple flowers next to his. Tommy scattered red poppy seeds from his wheelchair.

illustration.description: Oscar kneels in the garden dirt with a small hand shovel, carefully placing seeds in holes. His face shows concentration and growing confidence. Zara kneels nearby planting purple seeds, while Tommy leans from his wheelchair to scatter red seeds. Their hands are dirty but they all look happy and focused. The garden plot is partially filled with small holes and planted areas.
illustration.alt: The three friends planting seeds together in the garden

pages.text: After planting, they watered their seeds with small watering cans. Oscar wasn't sad anymore - he felt excited! 'When will they grow?' he asked. Ms. Chen laughed. 'We must be patient and take care of them every day. Soon you'll see green sprouts!'

illustration.description: Oscar holds a small red watering can, gently sprinkling water over the planted garden. His face beams with happiness and anticipation. Zara and Tommy also water their sections with colorful watering cans. Tiny droplets of water sparkle in the sunlight. The freshly watered soil looks rich and dark, ready for growing.
illustration.alt: The children watering their newly planted seeds

pages.text: Every day, Oscar visited the garden. First came tiny green sprouts that made him gasp with joy. Then stems grew taller and taller. Finally, beautiful flowers bloomed everywhere! Yellow sunflowers, purple cosmos, and red poppies made a rainbow garden. Oscar felt so happy and proud.

illustration.description: Oscar stands in the now-blooming garden with his arms spread wide in celebration, his face glowing with pure joy and pride. Tall yellow sunflowers tower behind him, while purple cosmos and red poppies create a colorful carpet around the garden. Butterflies flutter among the flowers, and bees buzz happily. The scene is vibrant and alive with rich greens, bright flower colors, and golden sunlight.
illustration.alt: Oscar celebrating in the beautiful blooming flower garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Oscar feel when he first saw the empty garden?
questions.explanation: Oscar felt sad when he saw the empty brown dirt with no pretty flowers.

questions.question: What color seeds did Oscar choose to plant?
questions.explanation: Oscar picked yellow sunflower seeds because they reminded him of sunshine.

questions.question: Who helped Oscar plant the garden?
questions.explanation: Oscar's friends Zara and Tommy helped him plant seeds in the garden.

questions.question: How did Oscar feel when the flowers finally bloomed?
questions.explanation: Oscar felt happy and proud when he saw the beautiful rainbow garden they had grown together.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Oscar felt _____ as he dug little holes for his seeds. After planting, they _____ their seeds with small watering cans. Finally, beautiful flowers _____ everywhere!
